name: claude-bridge
description: Live edit visibility for Claude Code: explorer follow, edit badges, native diffs, and transport controls (dwell/freeze/skip).

commands.title: Skip Burst (Run to Next File / Quiet)

claudeBridge.port.description: Localhost port for the hook HTTP bridge. Changing this restarts the server. If busy, the bridge probes up to port+10.

claudeBridge.follow.enabled.description: Reveal and select files in the Explorer as Claude edits them.

claudeBridge.follow.userActivityGraceMs.description: Skip Explorer reveals if you interacted with the editor/Explorer within this many milliseconds (best-effort anti-fight heuristic). 0 = always reveal.

claudeBridge.diff.open.description: When to open a native diff for a Claude edit.

claudeBridge.diff.baseline.description: Diff baseline: snapshot taken just before this edit, or the first snapshot of the session.

claudeBridge.diff.preview.description: Open diffs as preview tabs (reused, italic title).

claudeBridge.diff.preserveFocus.description: Open diffs without stealing focus (keeps focus in the terminal).

claudeBridge.diff.maxOpenDiffs.description: Maximum number of bridge-opened diff tabs kept open; oldest are closed. 0 = unlimited.

claudeBridge.diff.closeOnRelease.description: Close the diff tab when the hold is released. When false, diffs stay open until newer ones push them past diff.maxOpenDiffs.

claudeBridge.hold.dwellMs.description: How long to hold Claude after each edit while you look at the diff. 0 = never hold, -1 = hold until manual resume (subject to hook-timeout safety release).

claudeBridge.hold.onlyFirstEditPerFile.description: Only hold on the first edit to each file.

claudeBridge.hold.minChangedLines.description: Only hold if the edit changed at least this many lines. 0 = no minimum.

claudeBridge.hold.onlyWhenFocused.description: Only hold when the VS Code window is focused.

claudeBridge.hold.include.description: If non-empty, only hold for files matching one of these globs.

claudeBridge.hold.exclude.description: Never hold for files matching these globs.

claudeBridge.hold.burstQuietMs.description: After Skip Burst, suppress holds until this long passes with no edit events.

claudeBridge.hold.burstScope.description: Skip Burst ends when an edit targets a different file ('file') or only after the quiet period ('time').

claudeBridge.hold.hookTimeoutSeconds.description: Must mirror the 'timeout' in your Claude Code hooks config. Used to auto-release holds safely before Claude Code gives up.

claudeBridge.hold.timeoutSafetyMs.description: Auto-release holds this many milliseconds before the hook timeout.

claudeBridge.statusBar.enabled.description: Show the Claude Bridge status bar items.

claudeBridge.watcher.enabled.description: Watch the workspace for changes made outside Edit tools (e.g. via Bash) during a Claude session.

claudeBridge.watcher.exclude.description: Globs the fallback watcher ignores (merged with files.exclude).

claudeBridge.watcher.sessionActiveWindow.description: A Claude session is presumed active for this long after the last hook event; watcher changes outside an active session are ignored.

claudeBridge.snapshots.maxTotalMB.description: Cap on in-memory snapshot bytes; oldest snapshots spill to disk beyond this.

claudeBridge.snapshots.maxFileMB.description: Files larger than this are not snapshotted (no diff for them).
